## HistoryQueriesGetters.historyQueries property

A sub-set of the [HistoryQueriesState.historyQueries](./x-components.historyqueriesstate.historyqueries.md)<!-- -->. If the [HistoryQueriesState.query](./x-components.historyqueriesstate.query.md) property is not empty, this list will only contain suggestions whose query matches with it.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
historyQueries: HistoryQuery[];
```
